changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Insert the EDAN PDW analyte (platelet distribution width) with LOINC 32207-3 (fL/EntVol form), reusing the WBC row's Hematology test_section when present. Guarded by NOT EXISTS loinc so it never competes with a catalog PDW (none exists on bench/prod; verified against the full test.loinc inventory + loinc.org) (LIS-192).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test (id, name, description, loinc, is_active, is_reportable, orderable, test_section_id, guid, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_seq'), v.name, v.name, v.loinc, 'Y', 'Y', true, (SELECT t2.test_section_id FROM clinlims.test t2 WHERE t2.loinc = '6690-2' AND t2.test_section_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), gen_random_uuid()::varchar, now() FROM (VALUES ('PDW(Whole Blood)', '32207-3') ) AS v(name, loinc) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc);

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H99S'

changeSet.comment: Map the EDAN wire code 'PDW' (OBX-4, per the H90-series field-repurposing profile) to the OE Test carrying LOINC 32207-3, under the existing EDAN H99S analyzer, so attachTestCodeLoinc emits the PDW->32207-3 pair the bridge applies. Guarded so it maps only where the 32207-3 Test exists (created by changeset 1) and no PDW map row already exists (LIS-192).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('PDW', '32207-3') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'EDAN H99S' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);
